item.title: Game Changer Season 8 Teaser
item.description:
It's time to sweeten the pot. New season coming soon.

Duration: 00:28

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted
